place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, North-East Coast, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Single-Storey 3-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa Steps from Plai Laem Beach
note: Fully staffed · daily breakfast & housekeeping · chef on request
sleeps: Up to 6 guests (+1 extra bed on request) · 3 en-suite bedrooms
blurb: A single-storey three-bedroom villa set in tropical gardens on the quiet north-east corner of Koh Samui, under a hundred metres from the calm sand at Plai Laem. A breezy open-plan living space slides open to a 12 m pool edged with sun loungers and a covered dining terrace, backed by a black chef's kitchen and a second guest kitchen. Three king bedrooms, each en-suite, with contemporary Asian-bohemian interiors and hand-crafted art — fully staffed with daily breakfast and housekeeping, and part of a two-villa estate with a private gym.
detail:
This single-storey villa sits among mature tropical gardens on the calm north-east coast of Koh Samui at Plai Laem, a short, level walk — under a hundred metres — from a quiet stretch of sheltered sand. The setting is green and private, screened by planting on every side, with the beach, Bangrak and Choeng Mon all close and Samui Airport a few minutes' drive away.

The living and dining space is a single breezy volume beneath dark timber beams, opening through walls of glass to the pool terrace beyond. Interiors are layered in a contemporary Asian-bohemian hand — pale plaster, herringbone stone floors, bespoke furniture and hand-crafted artworks — anchored by a striking black chef's kitchen with a stone island alongside a second guest kitchen for casual breakfasts.

Outside, a 12 m pool runs the length of a sun-washed terrace, framed by an eight-seat lounger, sunbeds and a covered outdoor dining area set against the greenery. The flat, family-friendly layout keeps every room on one level and folds the whole house open to the garden and the sea breeze.

All three bedrooms carry king beds and en-suite bathrooms, styled with the same collected, textural feel as the living spaces. The master suite opens to the terrace with a dual-vanity bathroom, rain shower and bathtub; the second bedroom has its own private terrace and dual-vanity bathroom; and the third is a comfortable king room with a rain-shower en-suite. Each has a Smart TV, espresso machine and mini-fridge.

The villa comes fully staffed, with daily housekeeping, a daily breakfast prepared in-house and an on-call villa manager, plus one complimentary return airport transfer. A private Thai chef can be arranged on request, and guests share a fully air-conditioned private gym with the estate's neighbouring villa. Baby cots and high chairs are available for families.

features.l: Under 100 m walk to Plai Laem Beach
12 m private pool with sun loungers
Master suite with bathtub, opening to terrace
Covered outdoor dining on the pool terrace

internalName: Villa Cella · White Lotus Estate Samui
